hero.title: Articles, guides and product notes on live 1-on-1 video chat.
hero.lead: This space is being built as a practical editorial layer for users and models looking for clear explanations, better context, and useful perspectives on the platform.
hero.tagline: Concise reads, calm presentation, and topics grounded in the real product: privacy, etiquette, settings, payments, platform updates, and the evolution of live interaction.

cta.title: Explore the platform while the editorial section keeps growing.
cta.text: If you want a more direct understanding of how the experience works, you can sign up as a user or set up your profile as a model while new articles are being published.

states.errorListing: Could not load the blog. Please try again in a few minutes.
states.errorArticle: Could not load the article. Please try again in a few minutes.
states.retracted: This article is no longer available.
states.empty: No articles published yet. Check back soon.
